Operation 'get_submission' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing, making it impossible for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, required inputs, or expected outputs. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves a specific submission (not multiple), specifies required parameters, explains the return value, and provides context for when this operation would be used.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific form submission by ID
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a single submission for a specified form. Requires the form slug and submission ID as path parameters. Returns the complete submission object including all field values and metadata. Useful for viewing detailed submission data or verifying submission contents.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing, making it impossible for AI agents to understand the operation's purpose, required inputs, or expected outputs. Improved version clarifies that this retrieves a specific submission (not multiple), specifies required parameters, explains the return value, and provides context for when this operation would be used.

message: Operation 'list_workspaces' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks specificity about scope (all vs. filtered). Description is missing entirely. Improved version clarifies that this returns workspaces for the authenticated user, specifies authentication requirements, explains the return format, and provides use case context for AI agents to determine when this operation is appropriate.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all accessible workspaces
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all workspaces accessible to the authenticated user. Returns an array of workspace objects containing workspace metadata such as ID, name, and configuration details. Requires bearer token authentication. Use this to discover available workspaces or populate workspace selection interfaces.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about scope (all vs. filtered). Description is missing entirely. Improved version clarifies that this returns workspaces for the authenticated user, specifies authentication requirements, explains the return format, and provides use case context for AI agents to determine when this operation is appropriate.

message: Operation 'list_fields' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details, missing_input_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too vague and doesn't clarify what 'fields' means in this context. Description is completely missing. Improved version specifies that these are form fields, explains the return structure, indicates potential filtering capabilities, and provides context for when an AI agent would use this operation to understand available field types.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve available form fields
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all available fields that can be used in forms. Returns an array of field objects with field type, configuration options, and metadata. Optionally filterable by field type or workspace. Use this to discover field types supported by the platform or to populate field selection interfaces when building forms.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too vague and doesn't clarify what 'fields' means in this context. Description is completely missing. Improved version specifies that these are form fields, explains the return structure, indicates potential filtering capabilities, and provides context for when an AI agent would use this operation to understand available field types.

message: Operation 'list_forms' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added context about authentication requirement, what is returned, and that it's user-specific to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and when to use it.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all forms for the authenticated user
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a list of all forms created by the authenticated user. Returns an array of form objects containing form metadata including slug, title, and configuration. Requires bearer token authentication.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is completely missing. Added context about authentication requirement, what is returned, and that it's user-specific to help AI agents understand the operation's scope and when to use it.

message: Operation 'create_form' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks specificity. Description is missing entirely. Added details about required inputs, what is returned (including the slug), authentication, and the side effect that the form becomes immediately available. This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect.

data.summary_suggestion: Create a new form in Formaloo
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new form with the provided configuration. Accepts form title, fields, and settings in the request body. Returns the created form object including the generated form slug, which is used for form access and submission. Requires bearer token authentication. The form is immediately available for submissions after creation.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity. Description is missing entirely. Added details about required inputs, what is returned (including the slug), authentication, and the side effect that the form becomes immediately available. This helps AI agents understand what data to provide and what to expect.

message: Operation 'get_form' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is vague about what 'Get form' means. Description is empty. Added clarity about the slug parameter requirement, what data is returned, authentication needs, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve a specific form by slug
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the complete configuration and metadata for a specific form identified by its slug. Returns the form object including title, fields, settings, and submission configuration. Requires bearer token authentication. Use this operation to fetch form structure before submitting data or displaying the form to users.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about what 'Get form' means. Description is empty. Added clarity about the slug parameter requirement, what data is returned, authentication needs, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'update_form' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks specificity about what aspects are updated. Description is missing. Added details about partial update support, what is returned, authentication, and the side effect that changes are immediate. This helps AI agents understand update behavior and scope.

data.summary_suggestion: Update form configuration and settings
data.description_suggestion: Updates an existing form identified by its slug. Accepts form configuration updates including title, fields, and settings in the request body. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated form object. Requires bearer token authentication. Changes take effect immediately and affect all new submissions.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks specificity about what aspects are updated. Description is missing. Added details about partial update support, what is returned, authentication, and the side effect that changes are immediate. This helps AI agents understand update behavior and scope.

message: Operation 'delete_form' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is too generic. Description is empty. Added critical information about the destructive nature of the operation, that associated data is also deleted, irreversibility, and authentication requirements. This is essential for AI agents to understand the consequences before executing.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete a form and its data
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes a form identified by its slug. This operation removes the form configuration and all associated submission data. Requires bearer token authentication. This action is irreversible - deleted forms cannot be recovered. Returns a success confirmation upon deletion.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description is empty. Added critical information about the destructive nature of the operation, that associated data is also deleted, irreversibility, and authentication requirements. This is essential for AI agents to understand the consequences before executing.

message: Operation 'submit_form' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary is vague about what is being submitted. Description is missing. Added clarity about the slug parameter, what data format is expected, that authentication is not required for submissions, what is returned, and the side effect of data being stored. This helps AI agents understand the submission workflow.

data.summary_suggestion: Submit form data for a specific form
data.description_suggestion: Submits form response data to a specific form identified by its slug. Accepts form field values in the request body matching the form's field configuration. Creates a new submission record and stores the provided data. Returns a submission confirmation including submission ID and timestamp. Does not require authentication - forms can accept public submissions. Submitted data is immediately available in the form's submissions list.
data.reasoning: Original summary is vague about what is being submitted. Description is missing. Added clarity about the slug parameter, what data format is expected, that authentication is not required for submissions, what is returned, and the side effect of data being stored. This helps AI agents understand the submission workflow.

message: Operation 'list_submissions' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_context, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary lacks context about which form's submissions. Description is empty. Added clarity about the slug parameter, what data is returned, authentication requirement, and access control (owner-only). This helps AI agents understand the scope and authorization model.

data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all submissions for a form
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all submissions received for a specific form identified by its slug. Returns an array of submission objects containing submitted field values, submission timestamps, and submission IDs. Requires bearer token authentication - only the form owner can access submissions. Use this operation to retrieve and analyze form responses.
data.reasoning: Original summary lacks context about which form's submissions. Description is empty. Added clarity about the slug parameter, what data is returned, authentication requirement, and access control (owner-only). This helps AI agents understand the scope and authorization model.
